products.name: Anti-Hair Fall Oil
products.short_desc: Nourishing herbal oil that strengthens hair roots and reduces hair fall.
products.long_desc: Himalaya Anti-Hair Fall Oil is enriched with Bhringaraja and Amalaki, two Ayurvedic herbs known for fortifying hair follicles. Regular scalp massage improves circulation, reduces breakage, and promotes thicker, healthier hair growth.
products.usage: Apply warm oil to scalp and hair, massage for 10 minutes. Leave for 2 hours or overnight before washing.

products.name: Bhringraja Shampoo
products.short_desc: Herbal shampoo with Bhringraja that cleanses scalp and controls hair fall.
products.long_desc: Formulated with the power of Bhringraja, this shampoo gently cleanses the scalp while nourishing each hair strand. It helps reduce hair fall and leaves hair soft, manageable, and visibly healthier with regular use.
products.usage: Apply to wet hair, lather gently, and rinse thoroughly. Use 2–3 times per week for best results.

products.name: Ophthacare Eye Drops
products.short_desc: Ayurvedic eye drops that soothe tired eyes and relieve conjunctivitis symptoms.
products.long_desc: Ophthacare Eye Drops combine Ayurvedic herbs like Haritaki and Vibhitaki to reduce eye redness, itching, and fatigue. Traditionally used for maintaining ocular health, these drops provide gentle relief from environmental irritants.
products.usage: Instil 1–2 drops in each eye 2–3 times daily or as directed by physician.

products.name: Septilin
products.short_desc: Immunity-boosting Ayurvedic tablet that enhances the body's natural defence mechanisms.
products.long_desc: Septilin is a polyherbal formulation containing Guggulu, Shankha Bhasma, and Guduchi that stimulates the immune system. Regular use helps the body fight infections faster and reduces the frequency of respiratory illnesses.
products.usage: Take 2 tablets twice daily after meals, or as directed by a physician.

products.name: Ashwagandha
products.short_desc: Adaptogenic herb tablet that reduces stress and improves physical and mental vitality.
products.long_desc: Himalaya Ashwagandha harnesses the power of Withania somnifera root to help the body adapt to stress. It supports cognitive function, improves energy levels, and promotes restful sleep as part of a balanced wellness routine.
products.usage: Take 1 tablet twice daily after meals with milk or water.

products.name: Amalaki (Amla)
products.short_desc: Pure Amla capsule rich in Vitamin C that boosts immunity and promotes radiant skin.
products.long_desc: Amalaki is one of the most revered Rasayana herbs in Ayurveda, prized for its exceptionally high Vitamin C content. It acts as a powerful antioxidant, supports collagen synthesis for healthy skin, and strengthens the immune system.
products.usage: Take 1 capsule twice daily after meals with water.

products.name: Liv.52 DS
products.short_desc: Double-strength liver protection tablet that restores liver function and detoxifies.
products.long_desc: Liv.52 DS is an advanced double-strength formulation with Caper Bush and Chicory that accelerates liver cell regeneration and protects against hepatotoxins. It is clinically proven to improve liver enzyme levels and restore hepatic function.
products.usage: Take 1–2 tablets twice daily before meals or as directed by a physician.

products.name: Liv.52 Syrup
products.short_desc: Liquid liver tonic suitable for all ages that supports healthy liver function.
products.long_desc: Liv.52 Syrup offers the same hepatoprotective benefits as the tablet form in a convenient liquid format suitable for children and adults alike. It helps in loss of appetite, liver enlargement, and recovery from jaundice.
products.usage: Adults: 2 teaspoons twice daily. Children: 1 teaspoon twice daily before meals.

products.name: Gasex
products.short_desc: Herbal antiflatulent tablet that relieves bloating, gas, and abdominal discomfort.
products.long_desc: Gasex combines Cowrie Shell Bhasma and Phyllanthus emblica to provide rapid relief from flatulence and gastric distension. The synergistic action of its herbal and mineral ingredients normalises peristaltic movement and eases digestive discomfort.
products.usage: Take 2 tablets after meals twice daily or as directed by a physician.

products.name: Triphala
products.short_desc: Classic tri-fruit Ayurvedic formulation that promotes digestive health and gentle detox.
products.long_desc: Triphala — a blend of Haritaki, Vibhitaki, and Amalaki — is Ayurveda's foundational digestive tonic. It gently cleanses the colon, supports regular bowel movements, and acts as a systemic antioxidant for total-body wellness.
products.usage: Take 1–2 tablets at bedtime with warm water.

products.name: Himcocid
products.short_desc: Herbal antacid suspension that neutralises excess stomach acid and soothes gastric lining.
products.long_desc: Himcocid is an aluminium-free antacid suspension formulated with Ayurvedic herbs that neutralise hyperacidity without side effects. It coats the gastric mucosa, providing lasting relief from heartburn, belching, and acid reflux.
products.usage: Take 2 teaspoons of suspension after meals and at bedtime, or as directed.

products.name: Purifying Neem Face Wash
products.short_desc: Neem-based face wash that purifies skin, removes impurities and prevents breakouts.
products.long_desc: Himalaya's Purifying Neem Face Wash harnesses neem's natural antibacterial properties to deeply cleanse pores and control excess oil. It leaves skin feeling fresh, clear, and balanced without over-drying.
products.usage: Apply to wet face, lather gently in circular motions, rinse with water. Use twice daily.

products.name: Neem Tablets
products.short_desc: Blood-purifying Neem tablets that clear acne, blemishes, and skin infections from within.
products.long_desc: Himalaya Neem Tablets work from the inside out, purifying the blood and inhibiting acne-causing bacteria. Rich in nimbidin and nimbin compounds, they help manage chronic skin conditions and promote a clear, even complexion.
products.usage: Take 1 tablet twice daily after meals with water.

products.name: Mentat
products.short_desc: Nootropic herbal tablet that enhances memory, concentration, and cognitive performance.
products.long_desc: Mentat is a clinically evaluated poly-herbal formulation that improves neurotransmitter levels in the brain. It enhances memory consolidation, increases attention span, and reduces mental fatigue associated with stress and academic demands.
products.usage: Take 2 tablets twice daily after meals for at least 3 months.

products.name: Brahmi
products.short_desc: Pure Brahmi capsule that sharpens intellect, memory, and reduces anxiety.
products.long_desc: Himalaya Brahmi contains standardised Bacopa monnieri extract, revered in Ayurveda as a Medhya Rasayana (brain tonic). It reduces cortisol levels, calms the nervous system, and supports long-term cognitive health.
products.usage: Take 1 capsule twice daily after meals with water.

products.name: Rumalaya Forte
products.short_desc: Powerful herbal tablet that relieves joint pain and reduces inflammation in arthritis.
products.long_desc: Rumalaya Forte combines the anti-inflammatory properties of Boswellia and Guggulu to provide clinically proven relief from joint and muscle pain. It improves joint mobility, reduces swelling, and supports cartilage health with regular use.
products.usage: Take 2 tablets twice daily after meals or as directed by a physician.

products.name: Rumalaya Gel
products.short_desc: Topical herbal gel for fast, targeted relief from muscle aches and joint stiffness.
products.long_desc: Rumalaya Gel delivers the anti-inflammatory power of Boswellia and Gaultheria Oil directly to the affected area. Its non-greasy formula penetrates deep into joints and muscles for quick relief from pain, stiffness, and swelling.
products.usage: Apply a thin layer to the affected area 2–3 times daily and massage gently.

products.name: Tagara
products.short_desc: Natural Valeriana-based tablet that promotes restful sleep and relieves insomnia.
products.long_desc: Tagara is derived from the root of Valeriana wallichii, Ayurveda's traditional sleep herb. It calms the central nervous system, reduces sleep latency, and improves overall sleep quality without causing morning grogginess.
products.usage: Take 1–2 tablets 30 minutes before bedtime with warm milk or water.

products.name: Evecare
products.short_desc: Comprehensive Ayurvedic capsule that regulates menstrual cycle and relieves PMS symptoms.
products.long_desc: Evecare is a multi-herb formulation that acts as a uterine tonic, regulating the menstrual cycle and easing dysmenorrhoea. It corrects hormonal imbalances, reduces abdominal cramps, and improves overall gynaecological health.
products.usage: Take 2 capsules twice daily after meals for at least 3 menstrual cycles.

products.name: Lukol
products.short_desc: Herbal tablet that treats leucorrhoea and restores vaginal health naturally.
products.long_desc: Lukol is an Ayurvedic formulation specifically designed to manage leucorrhoea and pelvic inflammatory conditions. It exerts antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects on the female reproductive tract, promoting a healthy vaginal flora.
products.usage: Take 2 tablets twice daily after meals or as directed by a gynaecologist.

products.name: Vatika Enriched Coconut Hair Oil
products.short_desc: Coconut oil enriched with Amla, Henna, and Lemon that nourishes and protects hair.
products.long_desc: Dabur Vatika Enriched Coconut Hair Oil combines seven natural ingredients to provide deep nourishment to hair roots. Amla strengthens, Henna conditions, and Lemon controls scalp infections, resulting in lustrous, dandruff-free hair.
products.usage: Warm slightly and massage into scalp and hair. Leave for at least 1 hour before washing.

products.name: Dabur Almond Hair Oil
products.short_desc: Vitamin E-rich almond oil blend that reduces hair breakage and adds silky shine.
products.long_desc: Dabur Almond Hair Oil is enriched with the goodness of Sweet Almond Oil and Vitamin E to deeply nourish every hair strand. It penetrates the hair shaft to reduce split ends, prevent breakage, and restore natural lustre.
products.usage: Apply generously to hair and scalp. Massage for 5 minutes. Leave overnight or for 1 hour before washing.

products.name: Dabur Honey
products.short_desc: Pure, unprocessed natural honey packed with antioxidants for daily health and immunity.
products.long_desc: Dabur Honey is 100% pure with no added sugar, sourced from the finest bee farms. A Rasayana in Ayurveda, honey is valued for its antimicrobial, wound-healing, and immunity-boosting properties when consumed daily.
products.usage: Take 1–2 teaspoons daily with warm water and lemon, or use as a food sweetener.

products.name: Dabur Chyawanprash
products.short_desc: Classic Ayurvedic Chyawanprash with 40+ herbs that builds immunity and vitality.
products.long_desc: Dabur Chyawanprash is a time-tested Rasayana formulated from over 40 Ayurvedic herbs led by Amla, the richest natural source of Vitamin C. It strengthens the respiratory system, builds stamina, and enhances the body's overall immune response.
products.usage: Take 1–2 teaspoons twice daily with warm milk or water.

products.name: Dabur Shilajit Gold
products.short_desc: Premium Shilajit capsule enriched with Gold Bhasma and Ashwagandha for vitality.
products.long_desc: Dabur Shilajit Gold combines purified Shilajit with Swarna Bhasma and Ashwagandha to rejuvenate the body at the cellular level. This premium formulation enhances strength, endurance, and reproductive health in men.
products.usage: Take 1 capsule twice daily with warm milk after meals.

products.name: Dabur Immunology Juice
products.short_desc: Tulsi and Giloy-based immunity juice that provides daily defence against seasonal infections.
products.long_desc: Dabur Immunology Juice is a refreshing blend of Giloy, Tulsi, and Amla that collectively activate the immune system's natural defence. Regular consumption helps reduce frequency of colds, flu, and other seasonal ailments.
products.usage: Take 30 ml diluted in equal parts water twice daily on an empty stomach.

products.name: Dabur Hepano Syrup
products.short_desc: Liver tonic syrup that protects against hepatic damage and improves liver function.
products.long_desc: Hepano Syrup combines classical Ayurvedic hepatoprotective herbs like Kalmegh and Kutki to safeguard liver cells from toxin-induced damage. It promotes bile secretion, aids detoxification, and helps restore elevated liver enzymes.
products.usage: Adults: 2 teaspoons twice daily. Children: 1 teaspoon twice daily after meals.

products.name: Dabur Hajmola
products.short_desc: Classic digestive candy made with Ayurvedic spices that aids digestion after meals.
products.long_desc: Dabur Hajmola is a tangy, digestive tablet formulated from rock salt, cumin, and other traditional spices that stimulate gastric secretions. It relieves post-meal heaviness, indigestion, and flatulence in a tasty, convenient format.
products.usage: Chew 1–2 tablets after meals as a digestive aid.

products.name: Dabur Nature Care Isabgol
products.short_desc: Natural Psyllium husk fibre supplement for smooth bowel movements and colon health.
products.long_desc: Dabur Nature Care Isabgol provides 100% natural Psyllium husk, a soluble dietary fibre that absorbs water and softens stools. It provides gentle, reliable relief from constipation and supports long-term colon health without habit formation.
products.usage: Mix 1–2 teaspoons in a glass of warm water. Drink immediately before meals or at bedtime.

products.name: Dabur Active Antacid
products.short_desc: Fast-acting herbal antacid that neutralises stomach acid and soothes heartburn.
products.long_desc: Dabur Active Antacid is formulated with natural alkaline compounds and Ayurvedic herbs that rapidly neutralise hyperacidity. It provides immediate relief from heartburn, acid reflux, and gastric discomfort without aluminium-based compounds.
products.usage: Chew 1–2 tablets as needed after meals or at the onset of acidity.

products.name: Dabur Active Blood Purifier
products.short_desc: Herbal syrup that purifies blood and clears acne, eczema, and chronic skin conditions.
products.long_desc: Dabur Active Blood Purifier uses a blend of Neem, Manjistha, and Giloy to eliminate toxins from the bloodstream. Purified blood manifests as clearer skin, reduced acne outbreaks, and improved complexion over consistent use.
products.usage: Take 2 teaspoons twice daily after meals with water.

products.name: Dabur Gulabari Rose Water
products.short_desc: Pure distilled rose water that tones, hydrates, and refreshes skin naturally.
products.long_desc: Dabur Gulabari is a pure distillate of Rosa damascena petals, a classic Ayurvedic skin toner used for centuries. It balances the skin's pH, tightens pores, provides lightweight hydration, and gives a natural rosy glow.
products.usage: Apply on clean face with cotton pad as a toner. Use morning and night.

products.name: Dabur Shankhpushpi
products.short_desc: Brain tonic syrup with Shankhpushpi that sharpens memory and improves focus.
products.long_desc: Shankhpushpi (Convolvulus pluricaulis) is one of Ayurveda's premier Medhya herbs, used for centuries to enhance intelligence and memory. Dabur's syrup formulation provides a convenient daily brain tonic that also calms nervousness.
products.usage: Take 2 teaspoons twice daily with water or milk, preferably in the morning.

products.name: Dabur Stresscom (Ashwagandha)
products.short_desc: Ashwagandha capsule that combats chronic stress, burnout, and anxiety effectively.
products.long_desc: Dabur Stresscom contains standardised Ashwagandha root extract, clinically proven to significantly reduce cortisol levels. It restores energy balance, supports adrenal health, and promotes emotional resilience under prolonged stress.
products.usage: Take 1–2 capsules twice daily after meals with warm milk.

products.name: Dabur Rheumatil Tablet
products.short_desc: Herbal anti-arthritic tablet that reduces joint inflammation, pain, and stiffness.
products.long_desc: Dabur Rheumatil Tablet combines Boswellia, Guggulu, and Rasna to address the root causes of arthritic pain. It inhibits inflammatory enzymes, reduces cartilage degradation, and improves range of motion in affected joints.
products.usage: Take 2 tablets twice daily after meals with water or as prescribed.

products.name: Dabur Rheumatil Oil
products.short_desc: Medicated oil for direct topical relief from joint pain, backache, and muscle spasms.
products.long_desc: Dabur Rheumatil Oil is a warming, analgesic Ayurvedic oil formulated for rapid topical relief. Its penetrating blend of Rasna, Nirgundi, and Sesame Oil reduces localised inflammation and relaxes tense, painful muscles.
products.usage: Warm oil and massage into affected area for 10–15 minutes. Use twice daily.

products.name: Dabur Sleep Support Tea
products.short_desc: Herbal bedtime tea with Ashwagandha and Brahmi that calms the mind and promotes sleep.
products.long_desc: Dabur Sleep Support Tea is a soothing blend of Ashwagandha, Brahmi, Chamomile, and Valerian designed to ease the transition into sleep. It calms a racing mind, reduces cortisol, and improves sleep depth without dependency.
products.usage: Steep 1 tea bag in hot water for 5 minutes. Drink 30 minutes before bedtime.

products.name: Dabur Ashokarishta
products.short_desc: Classical Ayurvedic tonic for women's health that regulates menstruation and reduces pain.
products.long_desc: Ashokarishta is a classical Ayurvedic fermented tonic centred on Ashoka bark, a renowned uterine tonic. Dabur's authentic formulation helps regulate menstrual flow, reduce excessive bleeding (menorrhagia), and relieve painful periods.
products.usage: Take 15–30 ml diluted in equal parts water twice daily after meals.

products.name: Dabur Mensta
products.short_desc: PMS relief tablet that eases menstrual cramps, mood swings, and bloating.
products.long_desc: Dabur Mensta is formulated with Shatavari, Ashoka, and Lodhra to provide targeted relief from the physical and emotional symptoms of PMS. It modulates prostaglandin activity to ease cramps and stabilises mood in the luteal phase.
products.usage: Take 2 tablets twice daily for 5–7 days before expected menstruation.

products.name: Dabur Honitus
products.short_desc: Honey-based herbal cough syrup that soothes throat irritation and relieves cough.
products.long_desc: Dabur Honitus is a non-drowsy herbal cough syrup made with honey, Tulsi, Mulethi, and Ginger. It soothes inflamed throat tissues, loosens mucus, and provides fast relief from both dry and productive cough.
products.usage: Take 2 teaspoons 3–4 times daily or as required.

products.name: Kesh Kanti Hair Oil
products.short_desc: Ayurvedic hair oil with Bhringraj and Amla that reduces hair fall and promotes growth.
products.long_desc: Patanjali Kesh Kanti Hair Oil is a blend of traditional Ayurvedic herbs including Bhringraj, Amla, and Brahmi in a sesame oil base. It nourishes hair follicles, strengthens roots, and prevents premature greying with regular use.
products.usage: Massage into scalp and hair. Leave for 1–2 hours before washing. Use 3 times a week.

products.name: Kesh Kanti Shikakai Shampoo
products.short_desc: Mild herbal shampoo with Shikakai and Reetha that cleanses without harsh chemicals.
products.long_desc: Patanjali's Shikakai Shampoo uses the natural cleansing power of Shikakai and Reetha (soapnut) to gently cleanse the scalp. Free from sulfates, it retains the scalp's natural oils while controlling dandruff and improving hair texture.
products.usage: Apply to wet hair, lather, and rinse well. Use 2–3 times weekly.

products.name: Drishti Eye Drop
products.short_desc: Ayurvedic eye drops that improve vision clarity and relieve eye strain and redness.
products.long_desc: Patanjali Drishti Eye Drops are formulated with herbal extracts that soothe eye muscles and reduce oxidative stress in the retina. Traditional herbs like Haritaki and honey-based compounds are used to maintain ocular health.
products.usage: Put 1–2 drops in each eye twice daily or as directed by a physician.

products.name: Giloy Ghanvati
products.short_desc: Pure Giloy extract tablet that boosts immunity and fights chronic infections.
products.long_desc: Patanjali Giloy Ghanvati is made from concentrated Tinospora cordifolia (Guduchi) extract, one of Ayurveda's most potent immunomodulators. It activates macrophages, elevates platelet counts, and provides broad-spectrum immune protection.
products.usage: Take 1–2 tablets twice daily with water after meals.

products.name: Coronil Tablet
products.short_desc: AYUSH-certified immunity booster with Giloy, Tulsi, and Ashwagandha.
products.long_desc: Coronil combines three potent Ayurvedic immunomodulators — Giloy, Tulsi, and Ashwagandha — as validated under AYUSH certification. It enhances the body's innate and adaptive immunity, supporting faster recovery from respiratory illnesses.
products.usage: Take 1 tablet twice daily after meals with water.

products.name: Tulsi Ghanvati
products.short_desc: Concentrated Tulsi tablet that relieves cough, cold, and boosts respiratory immunity.
products.long_desc: Patanjali Tulsi Ghanvati contains a potent extract of Ocimum sanctum (Holy Basil), revered as 'Queen of Herbs' in Ayurveda. It has strong antimicrobial and adaptogenic properties that protect against upper respiratory infections.
products.usage: Take 1–2 tablets twice daily with water, especially during seasonal changes.

products.name: Livamrit
products.short_desc: Liver cleanse syrup with Kutki and Kalmegh that detoxifies and regenerates liver cells.
products.long_desc: Patanjali Livamrit is a classical Ayurvedic liver tonic combining Kutki, Kalmegh, and Bhumi Amla to protect and restore hepatic function. It accelerates regeneration of damaged liver cells and normalises elevated liver enzymes.
products.usage: Take 2 teaspoons twice daily before meals with water.

products.name: Punarnavadi Mandoor
products.short_desc: Classical iron-based liver tonic that treats anaemia and supports liver detoxification.
products.long_desc: Punarnavadi Mandoor is a traditional Ayurvedic iron preparation used for anaemia and hepatic disorders. It combines Punarnava with processed iron ash to improve haemoglobin levels while simultaneously supporting liver and spleen function.
products.usage: Take 2 tablets twice daily after meals with buttermilk or as directed by a physician.

products.name: Udarkalp Churna
products.short_desc: Herbal powder blend that relieves chronic constipation and cleanses the colon gently.
products.long_desc: Patanjali Udarkalp Churna is a laxative herbal powder formulated to provide gentle overnight relief from constipation. Its blend of Isabgol, Senna, and Triphala softens stools, stimulates peristalsis, and promotes a clean bowel.
products.usage: Mix 1 teaspoon in warm water at bedtime. Increase water intake during use.

products.name: Pachak Ajwain
products.short_desc: Salted digestive Ajwain (carom seeds) that provides instant relief from indigestion.
products.long_desc: Patanjali Pachak Ajwain uses the carminative power of Carom seeds (Ajwain) enhanced with rock salt and lemon. Thymol in Ajwain activates digestive enzymes, instantly relieving gas, bloating, and sluggish digestion.
products.usage: Chew a small amount after meals or steep in warm water for a digestive tea.

products.name: Hing Goli
products.short_desc: Asafoetida digestive tablet that provides rapid relief from gas, colic, and bloating.
products.long_desc: Patanjali Hing Goli harnesses the powerful antispasmodic and carminative properties of Ferula asafoetida (Hing). It quickly dissolves intestinal gas, relieves abdominal colic, and stimulates healthy digestive enzyme secretion.
products.usage: Dissolve 1–2 tablets under the tongue or chew after meals for digestive relief.

products.name: Patanjali Aloe Vera Gel
products.short_desc: Pure Aloe Vera gel that soothes, hydrates, and heals all skin types.
products.long_desc: Patanjali Aloe Vera Gel contains fresh Aloe barbadensis leaf gel that intensely hydrates and calms irritated skin. Rich in polysaccharides and antioxidants, it heals sunburn, reduces acne redness, and serves as a lightweight daily moisturiser.
products.usage: Apply a thin layer on clean skin. Use morning and night, or as needed for soothing.

products.name: Kayakalp Vati
products.short_desc: Ayurvedic blood purifier tablet that treats skin diseases including psoriasis and eczema.
products.long_desc: Kayakalp Vati is a classical Ayurvedic formulation for chronic skin disorders. It purifies blood by eliminating metabolic toxins (Ama), treats conditions like psoriasis, eczema, and leprosy from the root, and restores clear skin.
products.usage: Take 2 tablets twice daily after meals with water or as directed by a physician.

products.name: Medha Vati
products.short_desc: Nootropic herbal tablet that sharpens memory, reduces anxiety, and calms the mind.
products.long_desc: Patanjali Medha Vati is formulated with a synergistic combination of Brahmi, Shankhpushpi, and Ashwagandha to enhance all aspects of brain function. It improves memory consolidation, reduces anxiety, and supports healthy sleep patterns.
products.usage: Take 1–2 tablets twice daily after meals or as directed.

products.name: Brahmi Churna
products.short_desc: Pure Brahmi powder that enhances cognitive performance and relieves mental stress.
products.long_desc: Patanjali Brahmi Churna is made from dried Bacopa monnieri leaves ground to a fine powder. This traditional brain tonic reduces synaptic degradation, improves neurotransmitter synthesis, and supports long-term mental clarity.
products.usage: Mix ¼–½ teaspoon in warm milk with honey. Take twice daily after meals.

products.name: Orthogrit
products.short_desc: Joint support tablet with Shallaki and Guggulu that rebuilds cartilage and reduces pain.
products.long_desc: Patanjali Orthogrit combines Shallaki (Boswellia), Guggulu, and Rasna to provide comprehensive joint care. It inhibits pro-inflammatory leukotrienes, supports collagen synthesis in cartilage, and improves flexibility in arthritic joints.
products.usage: Take 2 tablets twice daily after meals with warm water.

products.name: Peedanil Gold
products.short_desc: Gold-fortified analgesic tablet for severe joint and muscular pain relief.
products.long_desc: Peedanil Gold is Patanjali's premium pain-relief formulation enriched with Swarna Bhasma and classical anti-arthritic herbs. It provides superior analgesic and anti-inflammatory effects for managing chronic joint pain and cervical spondylosis.
products.usage: Take 1–2 tablets twice daily after meals with warm water or as prescribed.

products.name: Ashwagandha Churna
products.short_desc: Pure Ashwagandha root powder that builds strength, reduces stress, and improves sleep.
products.long_desc: Patanjali Ashwagandha Churna is made from the roots of Withania somnifera and is a foundational Ayurvedic Rasayana. Regular consumption builds muscle mass, reduces cortisol levels, and promotes deep, restorative sleep.
products.usage: Mix ½ teaspoon in warm milk with honey or jaggery. Take twice daily.

products.name: Rajahpravartini Vati
products.short_desc: Classical emmenagogue tablet that stimulates and regularises delayed or absent menstruation.
products.long_desc: Rajahpravartini Vati is an established Ayurvedic formulation for irregular or suppressed menstruation (oligomenorrhoea and amenorrhoea). It stimulates the uterus, corrects hormonal imbalances, and regularises the menstrual cycle naturally.
products.usage: Take 1–2 tablets twice daily after meals with warm water. Use under medical supervision.

products.name: Shatavari Churna
products.short_desc: Pure Shatavari powder — Ayurveda's premier women's tonic for hormonal balance.
products.long_desc: Patanjali Shatavari Churna is derived from Asparagus racemosus roots, widely regarded as the most important Ayurvedic herb for women's health. It regulates oestrogen levels, supports lactation, and eases menopausal symptoms.
products.usage: Mix 1 teaspoon in warm milk twice daily, or as directed by a physician.

products.name: Bhringrajasav
products.short_desc: Classical fermented Bhringraj tonic that prevents hair fall and stimulates new growth.
products.long_desc: Baidyanath Bhringrajasav is a traditional Ayurvedic Asava (fermented liquid) centred on Bhringaraja. The natural fermentation process increases bioavailability of the active compounds, making it highly effective for promoting hair regrowth.
products.usage: Take 15–20 ml diluted in equal water twice daily after meals.

products.name: Mahabhringraj Oil
products.short_desc: Classical medicated hair oil that treats alopecia and promotes long, thick hair.
products.long_desc: Baidyanath Mahabhringraj Oil is prepared according to the classical Tailapaka method, infusing a sesame oil base with over a dozen herbs. It deeply conditions the scalp, reduces alopecia, and promotes the Anagen (growth) phase of the hair cycle.
products.usage: Warm the oil and massage into scalp for 15 minutes. Leave overnight for best results.

products.name: Mahatriphala Ghrita
products.short_desc: Classical medicated ghee for eye health that improves vision and treats eye disorders.
products.long_desc: Mahatriphala Ghrita is an ancient Ayurvedic formulation prepared by processing Triphala and other ocular herbs in purified cow's ghee. It nourishes the optic nerve, improves visual acuity, and manages conditions like conjunctivitis and early cataracts.
products.usage: Take ½–1 teaspoon with warm milk or water twice daily or as directed by a physician.

products.name: Kesari Kalp Royal Chyawanprash
products.short_desc: Premium Chyawanprash enriched with Saffron and Gold Bhasma for superior rejuvenation.
products.long_desc: Baidyanath Kesari Kalp is an elevated Chyawanprash formulation enriched with Kesar (Saffron), Swarna Bhasma (Gold), and over 50 traditional herbs. This royal Rasayana provides exceptional rejuvenation, building ojas and immunity at a deep level.
products.usage: Take 1–2 teaspoons twice daily with warm milk.

products.name: Arjunarishta
products.short_desc: Heart-strengthening Arjuna tonic that supports cardiovascular health and stamina.
products.long_desc: Baidyanath Arjunarishta is a classical fermented tonic based on Terminalia arjuna bark, Ayurveda's most celebrated cardiac herb. It strengthens myocardial muscles, reduces LDL cholesterol, and improves exercise tolerance.
products.usage: Take 15–20 ml diluted in equal water twice daily after meals.

products.name: Basant Kusmakar Ras
products.short_desc: Premium Rasa formulation with Gold and Pearl for diabetes management and vitality.
products.long_desc: Basant Kusmakar Ras is one of Ayurveda's most precious formulations, containing Swarna Bhasma, Rajat Bhasma, and Mukta Pishti. It is primarily used for managing Type 2 diabetes, improving pancreatic function, and restoring depleted vitality.
products.usage: Take 1 tablet twice daily with honey and ghee or as prescribed by an Ayurvedic physician.

products.name: Liverol
products.short_desc: Liver protective tablet that treats hepatitis, fatty liver, and normalises liver function.
products.long_desc: Baidyanath Liverol combines Bhumi Amla, Kalmegh, and Kutki for multi-pathway liver protection. It is effective in managing viral hepatitis, alcoholic liver disease, and non-alcoholic fatty liver while lowering SGPT and SGOT levels.
products.usage: Take 2 tablets twice daily after meals with water.

products.name: Kalmeghasav
products.short_desc: Kalmegh-based liver Asava that detoxifies the liver and treats chronic liver conditions.
products.long_desc: Baidyanath Kalmeghasav is a self-generated fermented tonic centred on Andrographis paniculata (Kalmegh). It provides potent hepatoprotective and antimicrobial effects, making it ideal for chronic liver infections and malarial fevers.
products.usage: Take 15–20 ml with equal water twice daily after meals.

products.name: Abhayarishta
products.short_desc: Classical purgative tonic that relieves chronic constipation and treats haemorrhoids.
products.long_desc: Baidyanath Abhayarishta is a fermented Ayurvedic tonic based on Haritaki (Abhaya), the gentle laxative fruit of Ayurveda. It stimulates peristalsis, softens stools, and provides reliable relief from piles and anal fissures.
products.usage: Take 15–20 ml with equal warm water at bedtime.

products.name: Gaisantak Bati
products.short_desc: Ayurvedic tablet that provides rapid relief from gas, flatulence, and abdominal pain.
products.long_desc: Baidyanath Gaisantak Bati is a carminative formulation specifically designed to relieve excessive gas formation in the digestive tract. It reduces intestinal spasm, expels trapped gas, and alleviates associated abdominal pain and cramps.
products.usage: Take 2 tablets with warm water after meals or at the onset of gas and bloating.

products.name: Lavanbhaskar Churna
products.short_desc: Classical digestive powder with seven salts that kindles Agni and improves digestion.
products.long_desc: Lavanbhaskar Churna is a classical Ayurvedic formulation containing seven different salts and digestive spices that powerfully stimulate Agni (digestive fire). It is particularly effective for loss of appetite, sluggish digestion, and IBS-type symptoms.
products.usage: Mix ½–1 teaspoon in warm water with a few drops of lemon. Take before meals.

products.name: Baidyanath Neem Tablets
products.short_desc: Pure Neem extract tablets for internal skin purification and acne treatment.
products.long_desc: Baidyanath Neem Tablets use a concentrated extract of Azadirachta indica to purify the blood and eliminate skin-aggravating toxins. Consistent use leads to a visible reduction in acne, boils, and chronic inflammatory skin conditions.
products.usage: Take 2 tablets twice daily after meals with water.

products.name: Surakta Syrup
products.short_desc: Blood purifier syrup that clears chronic skin disorders and improves skin health.
products.long_desc: Baidyanath Surakta Syrup combines Manjistha, Sariva, and Neem to provide deep-acting blood purification. It is recommended for chronic urticaria, pruritus, eczema, and other blood-borne skin conditions, restoring lasting clarity.
products.usage: Take 2 teaspoons twice daily after meals diluted in equal parts water.

products.name: Memorax
products.short_desc: Nootropic syrup with Brahmi and Shankhpushpi that enhances memory and concentration.
products.long_desc: Baidyanath Memorax is formulated with Medhya (brain-nourishing) herbs including Brahmi, Shankhpushpi, and Jatamasi. It improves memory retention, boosts concentration, and calms exam or work-related anxiety in students and professionals.
products.usage: Take 2 teaspoons twice daily with water or milk after meals.

products.name: Ashwagandharishta
products.short_desc: Fermented Ashwagandha tonic that combats stress, anxiety, and nervous debility.
products.long_desc: Baidyanath Ashwagandharishta is a classical Ayurvedic Arishta that delivers Ashwagandha's adaptogenic benefits through the enhanced bioavailability of natural fermentation. It rebuilds nervous tissue, improves sleep quality, and restores mental energy.
products.usage: Take 15–20 ml diluted in equal water twice daily after meals.

products.name: Mahayograj Guggulu
products.short_desc: Classical Guggulu formulation for chronic arthritis, gout, and neuromuscular disorders.
products.long_desc: Baidyanath Mahayograj Guggulu is a classical herbo-mineral formulation with over 28 ingredients including purified Guggulu and silver-based Bhasmas. It is the gold standard Ayurvedic treatment for chronic Vata disorders, arthritis, and sciatica.
products.usage: Take 2 tablets twice daily after meals with warm water or castor oil.

products.name: Rhuma Oil
products.short_desc: Medicated pain-relief oil for arthritis, backache, and joint inflammation.
products.long_desc: Baidyanath Rhuma Oil is a potent medicated oil prepared with Nirgundi, Rasna, and Datura that penetrates deep joint tissues to provide analgesic relief. Regular massage reduces synovial inflammation and increases range of motion.
products.usage: Warm oil and massage into affected joint for 15 minutes. Use twice daily.

products.name: Sarpgandha Bati
products.short_desc: Ayurvedic tablet with Rauwolfia that lowers blood pressure and induces restful sleep.
products.long_desc: Baidyanath Sarpgandha Bati contains Rauwolfia serpentina, one of Ayurveda's most potent sedative-hypnotic herbs. It calms central nervous system overactivity, lowers elevated blood pressure, and promotes deep, restorative sleep.
products.usage: Take 1–2 tablets at bedtime with warm water. Use under physician supervision.

products.name: Pradarantak Lauh
products.short_desc: Iron-based Ayurvedic tablet that treats excessive menstrual bleeding and anaemia.
products.long_desc: Pradarantak Lauh is a classical iron-mineral formulation for women with heavy menstrual bleeding (menorrhagia) and associated iron-deficiency anaemia. It astringes the uterine lining, reduces blood loss, and replenishes depleted iron stores.
products.usage: Take 1–2 tablets twice daily after meals with honey and rice water.

products.name: Nashtpushpantak Ras
products.short_desc: Classical Rasa medicine that treats primary and secondary amenorrhoea in women.
products.long_desc: Baidyanath Nashtpushpantak Ras is a time-honoured Ayurvedic formulation for restoring absent or suppressed menstruation. Its synergistic blend of Kasisa Bhasma and uterine-stimulating herbs corrects the Vata imbalance underlying amenorrhoea.
products.usage: Take 1–2 tablets twice daily after meals with cow's milk. Use under medical supervision.

products.name: Zandu Hair Growth Capsule
products.short_desc: Biotin and Ayurvedic herb capsule that accelerates hair growth and reduces thinning.
products.long_desc: Zandu Hair Growth Capsules combine modern Biotin with traditional herbs like Bhringraj and Amla to address hair thinning from multiple angles. They improve the Anagen-to-Telogen ratio, resulting in visibly denser hair within 3 months.
products.usage: Take 1 capsule twice daily after meals with water for a minimum of 3 months.

products.name: Zandu Anti-Dandruff Shampoo
products.short_desc: Ayurvedic shampoo with Neem and Tea Tree that eliminates dandruff and soothes the scalp.
products.long_desc: Zandu Anti-Dandruff Shampoo fuses the antifungal action of Neem and Tea Tree Oil with soothing Aloe Vera to tackle dandruff at its root. It controls Malassezia fungal growth, reduces itching, and leaves the scalp healthy and flake-free.
products.usage: Apply to wet hair, lather, leave for 2 minutes, and rinse. Use 3 times a week.

products.name: Zandu Triphala Tablets
products.short_desc: Triphala tablet that promotes regularity, detoxification, and systemic antioxidant protection.
products.long_desc: Zandu Triphala contains the three myrobalan fruits — Haritaki, Vibhitaki, and Amalaki — in precise classical proportions. It gently stimulates bowel motility, detoxifies the digestive tract, and provides potent antioxidant protection across organ systems.
products.usage: Take 1–2 tablets at bedtime with warm water.

products.name: Zandu Chyawanprash AD
products.short_desc: Advanced defence Chyawanprash with added Haldi and Tulsi for enhanced immunity.
products.long_desc: Zandu Chyawanprash AD upgrades the classic Chyawanprash formula with added Haldi (Turmeric) and Tulsi for enhanced anti-inflammatory and antiviral defence. It is ideal for those seeking an immunity boost during seasonal transitions.
products.usage: Take 1–2 teaspoons twice daily with warm milk.

products.name: Vigorex Gold
products.short_desc: Premium vitality capsule with Shilajit and Gold Bhasma for energy and reproductive health.
products.long_desc: Zandu Vigorex Gold is a potent Rasayana combining Shilajit, Swarna Bhasma, and Ashwagandha for maximum vitality enhancement. It improves physical endurance, supports male reproductive health, and revitalises the body at the cellular level.
products.usage: Take 1 capsule twice daily with warm milk after meals.

products.name: Zandu Kesari Jivan
products.short_desc: Saffron-enriched Chyawanprash Rasayana for strength, memory, and total-body wellness.
products.long_desc: Zandu Kesari Jivan is an enriched Chyawanprash-type Rasayana containing Kesar, over 50 herbs, and precious minerals. Revered for its rejuvenating properties, it builds Ojas, improves memory, and enhances overall physical and mental vitality.
products.usage: Take 1–2 teaspoons with warm milk twice daily.

products.name: Arogyavardhani Vati
products.short_desc: Classical liver and metabolic tablet that treats liver disease and clears skin disorders.
products.long_desc: Arogyavardhani Vati is one of Ayurveda's most versatile formulations, acting primarily on the liver and metabolism. It increases bile secretion, treats fatty liver and jaundice, and clears skin disorders that arise from impaired liver function.
products.usage: Take 2 tablets twice daily after meals with warm water.

products.name: Zandu Liver Detox
products.short_desc: Modern Ayurvedic liver detox capsule that protects against toxin overload and supports enzymes.
products.long_desc: Zandu Liver Detox combines classical herbs like Bhumi Amla and Kutki with modern standardised extracts for potent hepatoprotective action. It neutralises hepatotoxins from alcohol, medications, and pollutants, restoring optimal liver enzyme levels.
products.usage: Take 1–2 capsules twice daily after meals with water.

products.name: Nityam Tablets
products.short_desc: Herbal laxative tablet for gentle overnight relief from constipation.
products.long_desc: Zandu Nityam Tablets combine Triphala, Senna, and Haritaki to provide reliable, overnight relief from constipation. The gradual action prevents griping, while Triphala supports long-term colonic health and regularity.
products.usage: Take 1–2 tablets at bedtime with warm water.

products.name: Zandu Pancharishta
products.short_desc: Five-herb digestive Arishta that improves digestion, appetite, and gut microbiome.
products.long_desc: Zandu Pancharishta is a comprehensive digestive tonic blending five classical Arishtas — Abhayarishta, Drakshasava, Kumaryasava, Lodhrasava, and Dashmularishta. This synergistic combination improves overall digestive function and resolves chronic Agni imbalances.
products.usage: Take 15–20 ml diluted in equal parts water twice daily after meals.

products.name: Nityam Churna
products.short_desc: Digestive powder that relieves constipation and promotes healthy bowel movement.
products.long_desc: Zandu Nityam Churna is a herbal powder blend of Senna, Haritaki, and Fennel designed for those who prefer a powder-based laxative. It works gently overnight to regulate bowel movements without causing dependence or electrolyte imbalance.
products.usage: Mix 1 teaspoon in warm water at bedtime. Adjust dose as needed.

products.name: Zandu Lalima
products.short_desc: Blood purifier syrup with Manjistha and Neem that clears acne and improves skin tone.
products.long_desc: Zandu Lalima is an Ayurvedic blood purifier formulated with Manjistha, Neem, and Anantmool to eliminate skin-aggravating toxins from the bloodstream. Regular use reduces acne, blemishes, and gives the skin a natural, healthy glow.
products.usage: Take 2 teaspoons twice daily with water after meals.

products.name: Zandu Aloe Vera Gel
products.short_desc: Pure Aloe Vera gel with added herbs for skin hydration, healing, and glow.
products.long_desc: Zandu Aloe Vera Gel combines fresh Aloe Vera with Rose Water and Cucumber extract for enhanced skin benefits. It provides intensive moisture, speeds up healing of minor wounds and sunburn, and serves as an effective skin brightener.
products.usage: Apply to clean skin and massage gently. Use twice daily or as needed.

products.name: Zandu Brahmi Tablets
products.short_desc: Standardised Brahmi tablet that boosts memory, focus, and learning ability.
products.long_desc: Zandu Brahmi Tablets contain standardised Bacopa monnieri extract that enhances cholinergic transmission in the brain. It is well-documented to improve memory consolidation, accelerate information processing, and reduce test anxiety.
products.usage: Take 1–2 tablets twice daily after meals with water.

products.name: Zandu Mental Care
products.short_desc: Advanced cognitive support tablet with Brahmi, Shankhpushpi, and Jatamasi.
products.long_desc: Zandu Mental Care is a comprehensive neuro-tonic formulation designed for modern cognitive demands. It synergistically combines Brahmi, Shankhpushpi, Ashwagandha, and Jatamasi to enhance memory, sustain focus, and protect against stress-related cognitive decline.
products.usage: Take 1–2 tablets twice daily after meals with water.

products.name: Zandu Balm
products.short_desc: India's trusted analgesic balm for headaches, muscle aches, and joint pain.
products.long_desc: Zandu Balm is a household name in Ayurvedic topical pain relief, formulated with Menthol, Camphor, and Eucalyptus Oil. Its warming and cooling dual action penetrates tissues rapidly to relieve headache, muscular pain, and minor joint aches.
products.usage: Apply a small amount to the affected area and massage gently. Repeat as needed.

products.name: Rhumasyl Gel
products.short_desc: Non-greasy Ayurvedic gel for targeted relief from arthritis pain and muscle stiffness.
products.long_desc: Zandu Rhumasyl Gel combines Gandapura Oil (Gaultheria), Nirgundi, and Shallaki into a fast-absorbing, non-greasy topical gel. Clinical studies support its efficacy in reducing osteoarthritis knee pain and improving functional mobility.
products.usage: Apply a thin layer on the affected area 3–4 times daily and massage till absorbed.

products.name: Zandu Sleep Capsules
products.short_desc: Melatonin-free sleep capsule with Tagara and Ashwagandha for natural, restful sleep.
products.long_desc: Zandu Sleep Capsules use a melatonin-free formula based on Valerian (Tagara), Ashwagandha, and Brahmi to naturally promote sleep onset and quality. They reduce sleep anxiety, decrease night-time awakenings, and leave you refreshed in the morning.
products.usage: Take 1–2 capsules 30 minutes before bedtime with warm water.

products.name: StriVeda Softgel
products.short_desc: Shatavari and Lodhra softgel formulated for complete hormonal balance in women.
products.long_desc: Zandu StriVeda is a women-first formulation combining Shatavari, Lodhra, Ashoka, and Kumari to support hormonal balance across all life stages. It improves menstrual regularity, supports fertility, and eases perimenopausal symptoms.
products.usage: Take 1–2 softgels twice daily after meals with water.

products.name: Zandu Shatavari Granules
products.short_desc: Shatavari granules that support lactation, reproductive health, and female vitality.
products.long_desc: Zandu Shatavari Granules provide a convenient and palatable way to consume Asparagus racemosus daily. Especially recommended for lactating mothers to boost milk production, it also supports overall female reproductive health and menopausal wellness.
products.usage: Mix 1–2 teaspoons in warm milk twice daily.
